predicates.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_heir_called_to_estate_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir called to the estate of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence_at_opening
predicates.description: The property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: is_household_effects_of
predicates.description: The property consists of household effects present in the family principal residence of the deceased.

predicates.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_right
predicates.description: The property is subject to a right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.24 or article 4.25.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the property as a legal consequence of the law.
